## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team energy is up; content quality improving with fewer revisions needed](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [New Airtable workflow implemented for better content management and publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Expanded content pillars defined; focus on cloud transformation and ETL modernization](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Need access to Google Search Console for better performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Team energy noticeably improved over last couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Material progress visible; fewer cycles to converge on V1s](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Content quality trending positively, requiring less tweaking](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

### Workflow Enhancements

  - [New Airtable setup integrating publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Added fields: proposed publication date, campaigns/categories, author byline](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [New status "Qt Publishing" for queuing up images and staging content](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Access granted to Prophecy's CMS for direct publishing](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on cloud transformation and ETL modernization](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Expanded content pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
    1.  Data democratization
    2.  Data engineering excellence
    3.  ETL modernization
    4.  AI/ML data innovation
    5.  Platform independence (addressing vendor lock-in)
  - [Upcoming webinar content to be repurposed into blog post and ebook](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Product release content planned for February](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Currently have access to Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Request made for Google Search Console access](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Needed for impression data in early stages](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [Less setup-intensive than GA](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Lance to discuss with Ashley about granting access](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### AI and Content Marketing

  - [Discussion on AI's impact on search and content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Gartner report confirms content still matters in AI-powered search](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Resistance to AI in content marketing community noted](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Agreement that content quality matters more than production method (human vs. AI)](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lance to follow up with Ashley regarding Google Search Console access](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Continue delivering 3 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Flesh out content pillar ideas and topics](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Generate blog posts promoting upcoming product releases (pending content from Matej)](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Lance to share Gartner report on AI and content marketing via email](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy based on Matt's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/65t2d5M1k5CjkxcA4CmxepzHmy7oLpHH?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
